channel.title: About Us on Wesole Nutki - Preschool
channel.description: Recent content in About Us on Wesole Nutki - Preschool

item.title: Enrollment - Wesołe Nutki
item.description:
We invite everyone interested in enrolling their child in our preschool to download the enrollment form:

Child Enrollment Form (PDF file)

Please submit completed and signed forms directly at the preschool.

Recruitment for the next school year takes place in February and March. Children are admitted to older age groups as places become available.

The recruitment process includes an introductory meeting and takes into account the order of applications.

item.title: Payments - Wesołe Nutki
item.description:
Payments should be made by the 10th day of each month to the bank account:

Przedszkole Niepubliczne Językowo-Muzyczne „Wesołe Nutki"

ul. Łaciarska 8, 50-104 Wrocław

Account number: 56 1020 5242 0000 2102 0260 4536

Bank name: PKO BP S.A.

item.title: Pricing - Wesołe Nutki
item.description:
Payment Principles for the 2025/2026 School Year

Payment Regulations

The registration fee is paid once and amounts to 900 PLN.

Monthly tuition is 900 PLN.

The meal fee is 25 PLN/day for a standard diet or 27 PLN/day for a special diet.

Tuition includes program activities (3 times a week English language classes, 2 times a week general development gymnastics with corrective elements, 2 times a week rhythmics, once a week logorhythmics) as well as events organized at the preschool, including theater performances and concerts.

item.title: Offer - Wesołe Nutki
item.description:
Our preschool cares for children aged 3-6 years (2.5-year-olds are accepted) in five groups. It operates in a detached, single-story building located in close proximity to Wrocław’s Market Square. The classrooms are equipped with furniture and toys adapted to the needs and age of the children. Pastel colors give the interiors a warm and cheerful atmosphere.

The preschool garden and the playground located in it provide joyful outdoor play. We pay special attention to ensuring that children spend as much time as possible in the garden and on walks, even in less favorable weather. The playground is equipped with two climbing sets with slides, a “monkey bars” climbing set for the oldest children, a train, a double sandbox, spring rockers, and a chalkboard for drawing.

item.title: Our Vision - Wesołe Nutki
item.description: We want to create a place that is friendly to children, parents, teachers, and all preschool staff. Our priority is to ensure that children feel safe and accepted as they develop their interests, learn through play and action, and acquire skills and knowledge according to their individual developmental path. Our goal is to raise children to live in harmony with themselves, with other people, and with the surrounding world, while preparing them to start school.
